title: MikroTik TOF-2400-8V-4 - LoRa/WLAN Omni Antenna Kit 8dBi
description: 2.4GHz LoRa omnidirectional antenna with 8 dBi gain for the 2400 - 2500 MHz band with one SMA female connector and 55cm height. The package includes a detachable 1m long pigtail with SMA male tips and a holder for mounting on a pole with a diameter of 25 to 50 mm LoRa is a solution for wireless data transmission, where the main goal is the lowest possible power consumption at low acquisition costs and a small data flow is sufficient enough MikroTik LoRa products are ready (not only) for the global network The Things Network - a well-known open source infrastructure that provides coverage of LoRa networks and thousands of useful applications. With The Things Network, you can get started with the Internet of Things in a single day. You can also easily upgrade to enterprise The Things Industries Omnidirectional antenna Clips for attaching the antenna to the mast 1m RF SMA-SMA cable
